metadata.name: Create a Purchase Order for Parts

description: A mechanic needs to order spare parts to repair a tractor.

nodes.task_description: Look up the required part numbers in the tractor's service manual.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct part numbers for the required filters and belts.

nodes.task_description: Check inventory at preferred local dealerships for the required parts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds one dealership has all parts in stock.

nodes.task_description: Generate a purchase order for the parts from the selected dealership.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a formal PO with the correct parts, quantities, and prices.
